title: Nailing USD bottom with multi agent system
author: fibspeak
selftext:
Yesterday I posted showing how my system went long bias XXXUSD into the low of yesterday.

In the comments I updated switching back to bear bias at 1.1580, Which was essentially the top.

Previous post: [https://www.reddit.com/r/ai\_trading/comments/1u35yzd/nailing\_the\_usd\_high\_with\_multi\_agent\_systems/](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1u35yzd/nailing_the_usd_high_with_multi_agent_systems/)
